Classes

Description
Application
The web application uses web framework Spring Web MVC.

The constants.
DepartmentsController
The controller for the Department.
The implementation of the DepartmentsApi.
EmployeesController
The controller for the Employee.
The implementation of the EmployeesApi.

TitlesController
The controller for the Title.
The implementation of the TitlesApi.
ValidationExceptionHandler
The exception handler for web requests validation.
The validation constraints are defined in the 'openapi.yaml' file.
WebConfiguration
The web configuration.
